title: European markets rise on hopes that Iran peace talks can resume
summary_full: European stocks opened higher on Tuesday amid renewed hopes that Middle East peace talks could resume, despite a U.S. blockade on Iranian ports.
summary_public: European stocks opened higher on Tuesday amid renewed hopes that Middle East peace talks could resume, despite a U.S. blockade on Iranian ports.

IR.label: positive
